models.label: Czech to English Qwen
models.intended_use: Optional Generative mode: translate one simple Czech sentence into simple English for Caatuu learning activities.
notes: Qwen3 translation LoRA trained from the curated bilingual Caatuu corpus using the chat-template SFT path, then continued once over train_all.jsonl for the release artifact after validation was complete.
Use with prompt format: Translate this Czech sentence into simple English. Return only the English sentence. newline Czech: SENTENCE newline English:

models.label: Word Sentence CZ
models.intended_use: Optional Generative mode: given one Czech target word, generate one short ordinary Czech sentence for Word World.
notes: Curriculum utility LoRA trained from the curated child-safe Caatuu corpus.
Relaxed smoke benchmark passed 74/80; all 80 outputs were Czech one-sentence responses with no meta-language.
